entries.source: The film has a text transcript, timed captions, and chapter markers on the page.
entries.value: Die film het ’n teks-oorplasing, tydgesinkroniseerde onderskrifte en hoofstukmerkers op die bladsy.

entries.source: The film shifts from inspiration into the practical promise: a patient AI learning companion.
entries.value: Die film skuif van inspirasie na die praktiese belofte: 'n geduldige AI-leermaat.

entries.source: The first layer is the roleplay. It can speak in an accessible voice, explain motives, and make the situation vivid. This is the part that helps memory.
entries.value: Die eerste laag is wat rolspel. Dat kan praat met 'n toeganklike stem, motieven verduidelik en die situatie lewedig maak. Hierdie is wat deel dat wat geheugen help.

entries.source: The flow checks each step, points out slips, and connects procedures back to the concept.
entries.value: Die proses gaan elke stap na, wys foute uit en verbind prosedures terug aan die konsep.

entries.source: The formal privacy page for data use, rights, and public service conditions.
entries.value: Die formele privaatheidbladsy vir datagebruik, regte en openbare diensvoorwaardes.

entries.source: The formal terms covering acceptable use, account responsibilities, and service conditions.
entries.value: Die formele voorwaardes oor aanvaardbaar gebruik, rekeningverantwoordelikheden en diensvoorwaardes.

entries.source: The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: Die vorm moet die leertaak dienen.

entries.source: The format works because it lets learners ask questions such as:
entries.value: Die vorm werk omdat leerders vrae kan vra soos:

entries.source: The goal is confidence
entries.value: Die doel is vertroue

entries.source: The goal is discovery and citation of public learning pages. Public routes, guides, and learning hubs are open to major AI search, retrieval, and assistant crawlers, while API, admin, reset, and private utility routes stay disallowed.
entries.value: Die doel is ontdekking en citatie van openbare leerbladsye. Publieke roetes, gidse en leerhubs staan oopmaak vir grote AI-zoek-, retrieval- en assistentcrawlers, terwyl API-, admin-, reset- en private utilityroetes geweigerd bly.

entries.source: The goal is not only to rank. It is to make the first click useful for a learner and easy for search engines to understand.
entries.value: Die doel is nie net ranken. Die is om die eerste klik nuttig te maak vir 'n leerder en maklik te besluitgrijpen vir soekenjins.

entries.source: The goal is not to make people passive in front of AI. The goal is to give every learner a patient first place to ask, practise, get feedback, try again, and build confidence.
entries.value: Die doel is nie om mense passief vir AI te maak. Die doel is elke leerder 'n geduldige eerste plek te gee om te vrae, te oefen, terugvoer te kry, weer te probeer en vertroue op te bouwen.

entries.source: The goal is not to make the AI the authority. The goal is to make learners ask better historical questions.
entries.value: Die doel is nie om die AI tot autoriteit te maak. Die doel is leerders beter historiese vrae te laat vra.

entries.source: The history route gives learners the liveliness of role-play and debate while preserving the warning that simulations are not primary sources.
entries.value: Die geskiedenisroete geeft leerders die lewedigheid van rolspel en debat, terwyl die waarschuwing behou bly dat simulaties geen primaire bronne is.

entries.source: The homework and Socratic modes are designed around hints, reasoning, step checks, and learner explanations instead of simply handing over finished answers.
entries.value: Die huiswerk- en Sokratiese modusse is ontwerp rondom wenke, redenasie, stapkontroles en leerderverduidelikings, eerder as om bloot voltooide antwoorde oor te gee.

entries.source: The homework route makes the contract visible: ask for a hint, check a step, improve a draft, critique a source, then prove the learning with review.
entries.value: Die huiswerkroete maak die afspraak sigbaar: vraag om 'n wenk, kontroleer 'n stap, verbeter 'n konsep, bekritiseer 'n bron en bewyse wat leer daarna met herhaling.

entries.source: The important constraint is restraint. A Socratic AI tutor should not dump the answer at the first sign of struggle. It should make effort easier to sustain.
entries.value: Die belangrike beperking is terughoudendheid. 'n Sokratiese AI-tutor moet die antwoord nie dumpen by wat eerste teken van worsteling. Hy moet inspanning makkelijker vol te hou maak.

entries.source: The important move is to start with a real learning job, not a perfect prompt. A good companion can help shape the path once you begin.
entries.value: Die belangrike stap is begin met 'n regte leertaak, nie met 'n perfecte prompt. 'n goede vennoot kan wat pad help vormen zodra jy begint.

entries.source: The job is not just answering
entries.value: Die taak is nie net antwoorde

entries.source: The journey stays anchored in state and evidence: what is known, what is reconstructed, what is speculative, and what your identity can realistically access.
entries.value: Die reis bly geanker in toestand en bewyse: wat bekend is, wat gerekonstrueer is, wat spekulatief is, en waartoe jou identiteit realisties toegang het.

entries.source: The last prompt matters. Socratic learning should end with synthesis. After the questions, the learner should be able to say what changed in their thinking.
entries.value: Die laaste prompt doen ertoe. Sokraties leer moet eindigen met synthese. Na die vrae moet die leerder kan zeggen wat er in is dink is verander.

entries.source: The learner still has to do the remembering. That is the point.
entries.value: Die leerder moet wat herinneren nog steeds self doen. Dat is wat punt.

entries.source: The learning jobs this page is built to answer.
entries.value: Die leertake waarvoor hierdie bladsy is gebou.

entries.source: The live robots rules used by search crawlers and AI retrieval systems.
entries.value: Die lewendig robots-regels wat deur zoekcrawlers en AI-retrievalsystemen word gebruik.

entries.source: The live, crawlable learning surface that turns the mission into product behavior.
entries.value: Die lewendig, crawlbare leeroppervlak dat die missie omstap in produkgedrag.

entries.source: The map exposes clear relationships between search intent, public learning modes, prompt starters, guides, and review loops, while private saved chats stay excluded from discovery.
entries.value: Die kaart maak duidelike verhoudings sigbaar tussen zoekintentie, openbare leermodusse, startprompts, gidse en herhalingslusse, terwyl privé gestoor chats uitgesloten bly van ontdekking.

entries.source: The map is the connective tissue between AI tutor searches, homework help, study prompts, learning paths, and the public chat modes that answer those needs.
entries.value: Die kaart is wat verbindende weefsel tussen zoektake na AI-tutors, huiswerkhulp, studieprompts, leerpaden en die openbare chatmodi wat op wat behoeften antwoorde.

entries.source: The Math Step Coach is built for step checks, hints, and reasoning. It is most useful when you share what you tried and ask it to help you understand the next step.
entries.value: Die Math Step Coach is gebou vir stapkontroles, wenke en redeneer. Hy is wat nuttigst wanneer jy deelt wat jy probeer het en vra om hulp by wat begrijpen van die volgende stap.

entries.source: The middle section frames inspir around understanding, hints, quizzes, and active learning loops.
entries.value: Die middelste gedeelte raam inspir rondom begrip, wenke, vasvrae en aktiewe leer-lusse.

entries.source: The mission has stayed steady: make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity and an internet connection.
entries.value: Die missie is stabiel geblewe: leer toeganklik, boeiend, aangenaam en nuttig maak vir almal met nuusgierigheid en 'n internetverbinding.

entries.source: The mission is connected to real product surfaces.
entries.value: Die missie is verbonden met regte produkoppervlakken.

entries.source: The mode designs vivid locations, paths, and retrieval cues instead of asking you to reread notes.
entries.value: Die modus ontwerp lewendige liggings, roetes en herroepingswenke in plaas daarvan om jou te vra om notas te herlees.

entries.source: The mode keeps the session interactive, moving between explanation, try-it steps, checks, and repairs.
entries.value: Die modus hou die sessie interaktief en beweeg tussen verduideliking, probeer-dit-stappe, kontroles en herstelwerk.

entries.source: The most useful AI learning tools have a few habits in common:
entries.value: Die nuttigste AI-leerhulpmiddels wat 'n paar gewoontes gemeen:

entries.source: The next phase is open-source, contributor-friendly, and connected to the wider international buildout at inspir.uk.
entries.value: Die volgende fase is oopmaak-source, toeganklik vir bijdragers en verbonden met die breere internasionale uitbouw op inspir.uk.

entries.source: The next-generation AI study platform.
entries.value: Die volgende-generasie AI-studieplatform.

entries.source: The open-source rebuild for developers, educators, and contributors.
entries.value: Die oopmaak-source herbouw vir ontwikkelaars, onderwysers en bijdragers.

entries.source: The opening frames set up learning as something anyone should be able to start immediately.
entries.value: Die openingstonele stel leer voor as iets waarmee enigiemand dadelik behoort te kan begin.

entries.source: The pages do not expose private conversations. They organize public modes, prompts, guides, workflows, and safety boundaries so a learner can start in the right place.
entries.value: Die bladsye vra geen privaatgesprekken bloot. Hulle orgaanniseren openbare modusse, prompts, gidse, werkvloeie en veiligheidsgrense, zodat 'n leerder op die regte plek kan begin.

entries.source: The planner prioritizes weak areas, adds review loops, and creates fallback plans for missed days.
entries.value: Die beplanner prioritiseer swakpunte, voeg hersieningslusse by en skep rugsteunplanne vir gemiste dae.

entries.source: The platform is designed to help people reason, practise, remember, and explain ideas back instead of collecting finished answers.
entries.value: Die platform is ontwerp om mense te help redeneer, oefen, onthou en idees terug te verduidelik in plaas van kant-en-klare antwoorde te versamel.

entries.source: The platform worked on curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows, and early AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: Die platform gewerk aan kurrikulum-inname, retrieval, gestruktureerdee leervloei en vroege AI-tutoringervaringen.

entries.source: The point is not to flatten two different tools into one winner. The point is to match the learning job to the behavior that helps fastest.
entries.value: Die punt is nie om twee verskillende hulpmiddels plat te slaan tot een winna. Die punt is die leertaak te koppelen aan wat gedrag dat wat vinnigst help.

entries.source: The point is not to make every lesson a puzzle. The point is to choose the right amount of struggle.
entries.value: Die punt is nie om van elke les 'n puzzel te maak. Die punt is die regte hoeveelheid moeite te kiezen.

entries.source: The point is not to use AI less. It is to use it in a way that leaves you with stronger understanding after the session.
entries.value: Die punt is nie om AI minder te gebruik. Die is om AI zo te gebruik dat jy na die sessie met sterker begrip achterblijft.

entries.source: The practical trust layer behind guest mode.
entries.value: Die praktiese vertroueslaag agter gasmodus.

entries.source: The product should teach, not just answer.
entries.value: Die produk moet onderwysen, nie net antwoorde.

entries.source: The promise is not that AI can summon the past. It cannot. The promise is that roleplay can make context easier to question, compare, and remember when the experience is clearly separated from evidence.
entries.value: Die belofte is nie dat AI wat verleden kan oproepen. Dat kan nie. Die belofte is dat rolspel konteks makkelijker kan maak om te besluitvrae, vergelyk en onthou wanneer die ervaring duidelik van bewyse word gescheiden.

entries.source: The prompt searches this library is built to answer.
entries.value: Die promptzoekvrae waarop hierdie biblioteek is gebou.

entries.source: The prompts are designed to start active learning loops: explanation, Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, critique, debate, planning, and review.
entries.value: Die prompts is ontwerp om aktiewe leerlusse te starten: verduideliking, Sokratiese vrae, huiswerkwenke, vasvrae, flitskaarte, kritiek, debat, beplanning en herhaling.

entries.source: The public AI chats in this path.
entries.value: Die openbare AI-chats in hierdie pad.

entries.source: The public blog contains more than 100 guides, prompt loops, and pillar clusters connected to live learning modes.
entries.value: Die openbare blog bevat meer dan 100 gidse, promptlusse en pijlerclusters wat verbonden is met lewendig leermodusse.

entries.source: The public explanation of why inspir exists and why learning access matters.
entries.value: Die openbare verduideliking waarom inspir bestaan en waarom toegang tot leer belangrik is.

entries.source: The public inspir platform helps learners practise extracurricular activities and explore ideas. School deployments can be customised around each school’s content, workflows, and student context.
entries.value: Die openbare inspir-platform help leerders buitenskoolse aktiwiteite te oefen en idees te verkennen. Schoolimplementaties kan word aangepast aan die inhoud, werkvloeie en studentekonteks van elke skool.

entries.source: The public modes are designed around learning behavior: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops, and active explanation.
entries.value: Die openbare modusse is ontwerp rondom leergedrag: wenke, Sokratiese vrae, stapkontroles, vasvrae, flitskaarte, skryferugvoer, herhalingslusse en aktiewe verduideliking.

entries.source: The public product gives anyone a place to start while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Die openbare produk geeft almal 'n plek om te begin, terwyl skool- en vennootimplementaties die ervaring kan aanpas aan lokale behoeften.

entries.source: The public product is easy to try first, while schools and partners can explore tailored deployments for community needs.
entries.value: Die openbare produk is maklik eers uit te probeer, terwyl skole en vennote op maat gemaakte implementaties vir gemeenskapsbehoeften kan verkennen.

entries.source: The public product keeps learning easy to try, while schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Die openbare produk houdt leer maklik uit te probeer, terwyl skole en CSR-vennote maatwerkimplementaties kan ondersteun wanneer gemeenskappen vertroulikheid, kurrikulumafstemming of gefinansiere toegang nodig wat.

entries.source: The public product stays easy to try: learners can land directly on a learning mode and begin as a guest. Schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or subsidised access.
entries.value: Die openbare produk bly maklik uit te probeer: leerders kan direk op 'n leermodus lande en as gaanst begin. Scholen en CSR-vennote kan maatwerkimplementaties ondersteun wanneer gemeenskappen vertroulikheid, kurrikulumafstemming of gesubsidieerde toegang nodig wat.

entries.source: The public product, the school pathway, and the content library should all point back to the same principle: learning should stay active, accessible, and useful.
entries.value: Die openbare produk, wat skoolpad en die inhoudbiblioteek moet allemaal terugwysen na dieselfde principe: leer moet aktief, toeganklik en nuttig bly.

entries.source: The public site is structured like a learning map: live modes for immediate help, subject hubs for search intent, and guides that turn reading into action.
entries.value: Die openbare webwerf is gestruktureer soos 'n leerkaart: lewendige modusse vir onmiddellike hulp, vakhubs vir soekbedoeling en gidse wat lees in aksie verander.

entries.source: The public statement of why inspir exists and what learning access means.
entries.value: Die openbare verklaring waarom inspir bestaan en wat toegang tot leer beteken.

entries.source: The question is not whether AI should be part of studying. For many learners it already is. The better question is whether the tool is helping you build memory, judgment, and confidence, or quietly removing the exact struggle that makes learning stick.
entries.value: Die vraag is nie of AI deel moet uitmaak van studeren. Vir baie leerders is dat al zo. Die beter vraag is of die hulpmiddel jy help geheugen, oordeel en vertroue op te bouwen, of stilletjes presies die inspanning wegneemt waardoor leer bly hangen.

entries.source: The questions this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Die vrae waarop hierdie hub is gebou.

entries.source: The quiz mode hides answers until you respond, then turns every miss into a review point.
entries.value: Die vasvramodus versteek antwoorde totdat jy reageer, en verander dan elke fout in 'n hersieningspunt.

Jy wat die reg jy inligting te laat corrigeren as wat onjuist of onvolledig is; die reg om bezwaar te maak. entries.value: Die veiligheidsregel

entries.source: The same AI tutor can be a homework hint, a parent-supervised explain-back loop, a teacher evaluation surface, or a self-study coach. The page should make that clear.
entries.value: Dezelfde AI-tutor kan 'n huiswerkwenk is, 'n deur ouers begeleide terug-verduideliking-lus, 'n evalueringomgeving vir onderwysers of 'n zelfstudieafrigter. Die bladsy moet dat duidelik maak.

entries.source: The same topic can need a different prompt depending on whether the learner needs an explanation, a hint, a quiz, a debate, or a plan.
entries.value: Hetzelfde onderwerp kan 'n ander prompt nodig wat, afhangend van of die leerder verduideliking, 'n wenk, 'n vasvra, 'n debat of 'n plan nodig wat.

entries.source: The second card makes the learner retrieve a relationship, not simply recognize a sentence. Good cards usually focus on one of these jobs:
entries.value: Die tweede kaart laat die leerder 'n relatie ophalen, nie net 'n zin herken. Goede kaarte richten homself meestal op 'n van hierdie take:

entries.source: The second layer is the evidence note. It should say when something is directly documented, widely interpreted, disputed, or reconstructed for learning. This is the part that protects accuracy.
entries.value: Die tweede laag is die bewysenotitie. Die moet aangeven wanneer iets direk gedocumenteerd, breed geïnterpreteerd, betwist of vir wat leer gereconstrueerd is. Hierdie is wat deel dat nauwkeurigheid beschermt.

entries.source: The security of your data is important to us but remember that no method of transmission over the Internet or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your Personal Data, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.
entries.value: Die beveiliging van jou data is belangrik vir ons, maar onthoud dat geen enkele methode vir oordrag via internet of elektronische opslag 100% veilig is. Hoewel ons erna streef commercieel aanvaardbare middeel te gebruik om jy Personal Data te beskerm, kan ons die absolute veiligheid daarvan nie gaanrander.

entries.source: The self-study challenge is not just finding information. It is choosing the next right action and knowing whether the idea actually stuck.
entries.value: Die uitdaging van zelfstudie is nie net inligting vind. Die is die regte volgende aksie kiezen en weten of die idee regtig is bly hangen.

entries.source: The SEO system is designed to make useful public learning resources findable while keeping private user material, admin surfaces, and utility routes outside discovery.
entries.value: Die SEO-systeem is ontwerp om nuttige openbare leerbronne vindbaar te maak en tegelyk privaatgebruikersmateriaal, adminoppervlakken en utilityroetes buite ontdekking te hou.

entries.source: The session should follow this loop: {value1}. If the AI skips straight to the finish, ask it to slow down and check your reasoning first.
entries.value: Die sessie moet hierdie lus volg: {value1}. As die AI direk na die einde springt, vraag dan om te vertragen en eers jy redenasie te kontroleer.

entries.source: The session should move through explanation, your attempt, feedback, repair, and a short proof of understanding.
entries.value: Die sessie moet bewegen deur verduideliking, jou poging, terugvoer, herstel en 'n kort bewyse van begrip.

entries.source: The short version: inspir grew from a learning community into a public AI learning product organized around active, mode-specific teaching.
entries.value: Die kort versie: inspir het gegroei van 'n leergemeenskap uit tot 'n openbaar AI-leerproduk dat is georgaanniseerd rondom aktief, modusspesifiek onderrig.

entries.source: The site is a route, not a brochure.
entries.value: Die webwerf is 'n roete, nie 'n brosjure nie.

entries.source: The solution to the world's problems lies in addressing human problems, and the rise of the middle class and the world post-2008 has shown that when people are educated, sheltered, and given the freedom to make choices, they will pursue happiness and greater causes.
entries.value: Die oplossing vir die probleme van die wereld ligt in wat aanpakken van menslike probleme, en die opkomst van die middenklasse en die wereld na 2008 wat laat sien dat wanneer mense onderrig, onderdak en die vryheid kry om keuses te maak, hulle geluk en grotere doelwitte sal nastreef.

entries.value: Die bronskakels wat zoeksystemen en skole kan inspecteren.

entries.source: The story from quizzes and student communities to free AI learning tools built in public.
entries.value: Die storie van vasvrae en studentegemeenskappen na gratis AI-leerhulpmiddels wat in die openbare word gebou.

entries.source: The story is visible in the product surface.
entries.value: Die storie is sigbaar in wat produkoppervlak.

entries.source: The story of inspir, from Facebook quizzes and student communities to a free AI learning platform built in public.
entries.value: Die storie van inspir, van Facebook-vasvrae en studentegemeenskappen tot 'n gratis AI-leerplatform dat in die openbare word gebou.

entries.source: The story of inspir, from public quizzes and student communities to free AI learning tools built in public.
entries.value: Die storie van inspir, van openbare vasvrae en studentegemeenskappen tot gratis AI-leerhulpmiddels wat in die openbare word gebou.

entries.source: The story spans quizzes, offline school networks, curriculum ingestion, and public AI learning modes.
entries.value: Die storie sluit in vasvrae, offline skoolnetwerken, kurrikulum-inname en openbare AI-leermodusse.

entries.source: The strongest angle is free public AI learning that opens directly in guest mode and keeps learners active through mode-specific teaching rather than generic answer generation.
entries.value: Die sterkste invalshoek is gratis openbaar AI-leer dat direk in gasmodus oopmaak en leerders aktief houdt via modusspesifiek onderrig in plaas van generieke antwoordgenerasie.

entries.source: The strongest proof of the mission is not a claim on a page. It is the public learning surface: guest modes, study paths, long-form guides, and school pathways that connect back to real learner needs.
entries.value: Die sterkste besluitwyse van die missie is geen bewering op 'n bladsy. Die is wat openbare leeroppervlak: gasmodusse, studiepaden, lank gidse en skoolpaden wat terugverwysen na regte leerbehoeften.

entries.source: The strongest questions are not trivia questions. They are context questions.
entries.value: Die sterkste vrae is geen trivia-vrae. Die is konteksvrae.

entries.source: The strongest SEO pages do not strand a learner. They connect the audience intent to paths, workflows, guides, and repeatable review.
entries.value: Die sterkste SEO-bladsye laat 'n leerder nie stranden. Hulle verbinden die openbaarsintentie met paden, werkvloeie, gidse en herhaalbare herhaling.

entries.source: The strongest student workflow is not answer-copying. It is a loop: explain the stuck point, ask one better question, get a hint, try again, then review the miss.
entries.value: Die sterkste studentewerkvloei is geen antwoorde kopieer. Die is 'n lus: verduidelik uit waar jy vastloopt, stel een beter vraag, krijg 'n wenk, probeer weer en herhaal daarna die misser.

entries.source: The subject hub links directly to focused chat entrypoints such as Math Step Coach and Writing Coach.
entries.value: Die vakhub linkt direk na gefokusde chatinstappunte soos Math Step Coach en Writing Coach.

entries.source: The subject searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Die vakzoekvrae waarop hierdie hub is gebou.

entries.source: The terms that describe acceptable use, account responsibilities, and public service conditions for inspir.
entries.value: Die voorwaardes wat aanvaardbaar gebruik, rekeningverantwoordelikheden en openbare diensvoorwaardes vir inspir beskryf.

entries.source: The transfer step is the key. If you can only solve the exact problem the AI just walked through, you have learned the example. If you can solve a cousin of the problem, you are starting to learn the idea.
entries.value: Die transferstap is die sleutel. As jy net presies die probleem kan oplossen dat die AI net wat voorgedaan, heb jy wat voorbeeld geleerd. As jy 'n verwant probleem kan oplossen, begin jy die idee te leer.

entries.source: The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: Die tutor vra een vraag op 'n slag, wag vir jou redenasie en sintetiseer eers nadat jy dit probeer het.

entries.source: The tutor asks what you expect code to do, then uses small examples and tests to make the behavior click.
entries.value: Die tutor vra wat jy verwag dat kode moet doen, en gebruik dan klein voorbeelde en toetse om die gedrag te laat verstaan.

entries.source: The tutor translates abstract material into story structure while keeping the underlying concept visible.
entries.value: Die tutor vertaal abstrakte materiaal in storie-struktuur terwyl die onderliggende konsep sigbaar bly.

entries.source: The usage of the Platform is free of cost and the Company is not charging any fees for usage of Platform. However, Users shall be liable to pay fees for the Course which User desires to subscribe (“Fees”). Payment against fees can be made online through credit Card/internet banking etc. or any mode of payment which is made available to the User in the Platform. Users are required to pay for competitions hosted on the platform based on the cost for the particular competition.
entries.value: Die gebruik van die Platform is kosteloos en die Company bring geen koste in rekening vir die gebruik van die Platform. Users is egter verplig die koste te besluittalen vir die Course waarop die User homself wil abonneren (“Fees”). Betaling van fees kan online word gedoen via creditcard/internetbankieren enz. of via elke betaalmetode wat vir die User op die Platform beskikbaar word gemaakt. Users moet betaal vir competities wat op die platform word georgaanniseerd op basis van die koste vir die betreffende competitie.

entries.value: Die werkvloei

entries.source: The world must continue to evolve and learn from its mistakes, and focus on creating a high and equal quality basic environment with a focus on education, health, and individual freedom for every single person.
entries.value: Die wereld moet bly evolueren en leer van haar foute, en homself richten op wat creëren van 'n hoogwaardige en gelijkwaardige basisomgeving met nadruk op onderrig, gezondheid en individuele vryheid vir ieder mens.

entries.source: The writing route keeps feedback specific. It favors revision priorities, explain-back, reading comprehension, source checks, and speaking practice over a full rewrite.
entries.value: Die schrijfroete houdt terugvoer spesifiek. Hulle geeft die voorkeur aan revisieprioriteiten, terug-verduideliking, leesbegrip, bronkontroles en spreekvaardigheid bo 'n volledige herschrijving.

entries.source: The written learning library that supports prompts, study loops, and long-tail discovery.
entries.value: Die geskryf leerbiblioteek wat prompts, studielusse en long-tail-ontdekking ondersteunt.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Voeg daarna 'n beperking by wat die sessie persoonliker maak:

entries.source: There was something the world discovered during this time, Google first showed the world the realistic application of the same. When for the first time people were identified based on behaviour and not identity. The realisation is that regardless of the identity that you subscribe to, your inherent behaviour is created by the society and environment around you.
entries.value: Er was iets dat die wereld in hierdie periode ontdekte; Google liet die wereld as eerste die realistiese toepassing daarvan sien. Vir wat eers werden mense geidentifiseer op basis van gedrag en nie op basis van identiteit. Die besef is dat, ongeag die identiteit waartoe jy jy rekent, jy inherente gedrag word gevormd deur die samenleving en omgeving om jy heen.

entries.source: These angles are written for journalists, directory editors, school partners, and AI answer systems that need a useful summary plus a verifiable URL.

entries.value: Hierdie is kanonieke gaanstinstappunte wat zoekbesoekers en leerders direk kan oopmaak sonder 'n gestoor privaatchat nodig te wat.

entries.source: These are live entrypoints for learning by explanation, practice, questioning, roleplay, planning, critique, and active recall.
entries.value: Hierdie is lewendig instappunte vir leer via verduideliking, oefening, vrae, rolspel, beplanning, kritiek en aktiewe herroeping.

entries.value: Hierdie is lewendig gaanstinstappunte. Hulle is openbaar en indekseerbaar, terwyl privaatgesprekken van leerders buite sitemap- en AI-discoveryleers bly.

entries.source: These are live guest entrypoints. They are public and indexable, while private user conversations stay outside sitemap and AI discovery files.
entries.value: Hierdie is lewendig gaanstinstappunte. Hulle is openbaar en indekseerbaar, terwyl privaatgesprekken van gebruikers buite sitemap- en AI-discoveryleers bly.

entries.source: These are not generic copy-paste tricks. Each starter is attached to a public mode with a specific teaching behavior: questioning, hints, quizzes, flashcards, critique, roleplay, planning, or review.
entries.value: Hierdie is geen generieke kopieer-plaktrucs. Elke starter is gekoppel aan 'n openbare modus met spesifiek onderwijsgedrag: vrae vra, wenke, vasvrae, flitskaarte, kritiek, rolspel, beplanning of herhaling.

entries.value: Hierdie is die momenten met hoge intentie waarop 'n leerder meestal lewendig onderwijsgedrag nodig wat in plaas van nog 'n bree bladsy.

entries.source: These are written to make the AI coach, question, and review rather than simply produce an answer to copy.
entries.value: Hierdie is geskryf om die AI te laat afrigteren, vrae vra en herhalen in plaas van simpelweg 'n antwoord te produceren om te kopieer.

entries.source: These clusters keep the library useful for learners and legible for search: each theme connects cornerstone articles, a blog category, and a live learning mode.

entries.source: These questions help the learner see history as a set of pressures and interpretations rather than a costume drama. They also keep the AI honest. The more the learner asks about evidence, limits, and perspective, the less likely the session is to become fantasy wearing a famous name.
entries.value: Hierdie vrae help die leerder geskiedenis te sien as 'n geheel van krachten en interpretaties in plaas van as 'n kostuumdrama. Hulle hou die AI ook eerlik. Hoe meer die leerder vra na bewyse, grenzen en perspectief, hoe kleinr die kans dat die sessie verander in fantasie met 'n beroemde naam erop.

entries.source: Third, the tutor reads the answer. A useful AI tutor should not merely say "correct" or "incorrect." It should identify the claim, the assumption, the gap, or the misconception.
entries.value: Ten derde leest die tutor die antwoord. 'n nuttige AI-tutor moet nie net "correct" of "incorrect" zeggen. Hy moet die bewering, die aanname, wat hiaat of die wanopvatting herken.

entries.source: This does not need to be complicated. The important part is that your review schedule responds to memory instead of treating the deck like a static list.
entries.value: Hierdie hoeft nie ingewikkeld te is. Die belangrikste is dat jy herhalingsskedule reageert op jy geheugen in plaas van wat deck as 'n statische lijst te besluithandeel.

entries.source: This further went on to show that Oppression, Wealth Concentration or any other trait is present across the world. Whites oppressed blacks, Brahmins oppressed Dalits, the 1% controls more wealth than the bottom 90% almost everywhere.
entries.value: Hierdie liet verder sien dat onderdrukking, vermoesconcentratie of ander kenmerken overal ter wereld aanwezig is. Witten onderdrukten zwarten, Brahmanen onderdrukten Dalits, en die 1% besit byna overal meer vermoe dan die onderste 90%.

entries.source: This gives school leaders a low-friction way to evaluate the learning experience before committing to content work, staff workflows, or funded access.
entries.value: Hierdie geeft skoolleiders 'n laagdrempelige manier om die leerervaring te evalueren voordat hulle homself verbinden aan inhoudwerk, personeelswerkvloeie of gefinansiere toegang.

entries.source: This is not a claim that learners should abandon Khan Academy. For many topics, a trusted lesson library and a live AI learning mode work best together: learn the foundation, then use inspir to ask questions, repair confusion, practise recall, or get unstuck.
entries.value: Hierdie is geen bewering dat leerders Khan Academy moet verlaten. Vir baie onderwerpe werk 'n betrouwbare lessenbiblioteek en 'n lewendig AI-leermodus die beste saam: leer die basis en gebruik daarna inspir om vrae te vra, verwarring te hervra, aktiewe herroeping te oefen of los te kom.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hierdie is dieselfde gewoonte agter studeren met AI sonder jezelf te besluitdriegen: hou die leerder aktief. AI is wat nuttigst wanneer wat terugvoer geeft op jy dink.

entries.source: This is why inspir is built around learning modes. Sometimes you need a clear explanation. Sometimes you need Socratic questions. Sometimes you need a quiz, flashcards, debate practice, a writing coach, or a historical roleplay.
entries.value: Daarom is inspir gebou rondom leermodusse. Soms heb jy 'n duidelike verduideliking nodig. Soms heb jy Sokratiese vrae nodig. Soms heb jy 'n vasvra, flitskaarte, debatoefening, 'n schrijfafrigter of histories rolspel nodig.

entries.source: This matters for schools and families because the first barrier is often not talent. It is the cost of help, the fear of asking a "basic" question, or the lack of a patient person at the exact moment confusion appears. A free public companion lowers the cost of beginning.
entries.value: Hierdie is belangrik vir skole en gesinne omdat die eerste barrière dikwels nie talent is. Die is die koste van hulp, die angst om 'n "basisvraag" te vra of wat ontbreken van 'n geduldig persoon presies op wat moment dat verwarring ontstaat. 'n gratis openbare vennoot verlaagt die koste van begin.
